steps.title: Focus on sequence
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize the order in which Ur and Columbia formed, so the answer needs to compare their formation dates rather than define supercontinents or describe only one.

steps.title: Eliminate nonchronological choices
steps.content: Choice B gives only Ur's date and breakup. Choice C describes supercontinents generally, and Choice D identifies both as supercontinents without showing which formed first. The remaining choice uses the 3.1-billion-year and 1.8-billion-year dates to show that Columbia formed long after Ur. The answer is A.
